title: Tracer-Cloud/OpenSRE
abstract: Build your own AI SRE agents. The open source toolkit for the AI era. Transform incident response, monitoring, and on-call with AI-powered Site Reliability Engineering.
abstract_zh: 开个AI维修小分队吧！Tracer-Cloud/OpenSRE，这可是新时代的神器，让故障响应、监控和值班不再手忙脚乱。有了它，你的代码就像自带了智慧大脑，再也不怕宕机冷笑话了！快来一起玩转AI时代的Site Reliability Engineering吧！
